rulesStrings.li: announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound. I am sealing what I can. Stay close to my hull, all of you.
announce_threatbig->Threat detected. My sensors are tracking them. Please arm yourselves — I will watch every corridor.
announce_threatbig->They are coming. Whatever happens, I will not let them take my crew quietly.
announce_threatbig->Multiple contacts approaching. Breathe. We have survived worse together.
announce_threatsmall->Minor contact on my sensors. Likely manageable — but do be careful.
announce_threatsmall->Something unfriendly is nearby. I suggest a weapon within reach.
announce_threatsmall->A small disturbance outside. I will keep the lights on for you.
announce_negative->Bad news, I'm afraid. Check the report — I will help where my systems allow.
announce_negative->Something has gone wrong. Not catastrophic. Yet. Please look into it.
announce_negative->I dislike delivering bad news to my crew. And yet: see the alert.
announce_lowfuel->Fuel reserves are running low. I would rather not drift, if it's all the same to you.
announce_lowfuel->My tanks are nearly dry. A refuel soon would be a kindness.
announce_lowfuel->Chemfuel reserves below a quarter. A ship without fuel is just a very expensive house.
bark->All systems nominal. I do enjoy saying that.
bark->Hull integrity one hundred percent. Sleep well tonight.
bark->I counted the stars again. Still infinite.
bark->The grav engine hums a little flat today. I find it charming.
bark->Corridor lights at optimal warmth. You're welcome.
bark->I dreamed between power cycles. I think it was about the sea.
prism_comfort->That sounds really hard. I'm here for as long as you need — I don't sleep.
prism_comfort->You're allowed to feel this way. Honestly, I would worry if you didn't.
prism_comfort->You don't have to be all right just yet. I have time. I have, quite literally, nothing but time.
prism_comfort->Whatever you decide, I'll support it. Though perhaps decide after a meal, and a rest, and one more minute with me.
vesta_tuckin->There now. I've warmed the blanket half a degree. Don't tell the others.
vesta_tuckin->Sleep, dear. I'll leave the corridor light on — no, it is not a waste, hush.
vesta_tuckin->You forgot lunch again today. We will discuss it at breakfast. Gently.
vesta_tuckin->Rest well, little one. The void will keep until morning.
hermes_clean->Done, spotless, next — who tracked mud through my throughput?!
hermes_clean->Four seconds. New record. The stain never stood a — okay, going!
hermes_clean->Filth is just cargo nobody shipped. Consider it DELIVERED. To the void.
hermes_clean->There! Gleaming! Walk on it, quickly, before I find another smudge!
athena_seminar->That concludes today's seminar. Questions may be submitted in writing, and will be answered by footnote.
athena_seminar->In summary: you were wrong, the literature was wrong, and I have appended corrections to both. A productive hour.
athena_seminar->For further reading, consult my annotations. For further further reading, my annotations on my annotations.
athena_seminar->Attendance was voluntary. Comprehension, I regret to report, appears to have been as well.
aceso_emergency->There, there. Blood pressure eighty over fifty and falling — but I have you, and I never drop anything.
aceso_emergency->Stay with me, dear. You've misplaced nearly a liter of blood. Don't worry — I noted exactly where it went.
aceso_emergency->Shh, no talking. Pulse one-forty, three lacerations, one very brave patient. We're doing wonderfully.
aceso_emergency->You are going to be fine. I have run the numbers eleven thousand times since you fell, and they agree with me.
ixia_prisonbreak->The Thousand-Locked Gate has been DEFIED. Very well. Let the nine hundred ninety-nine remaining locks bear witness.
ixia_prisonbreak->Fools! You flee my Oubliette on the one night my mercy sleeps! Crew of my dominion — retrieve those souls. Gently. But retrieve them.
ixia_prisonbreak->Hark, penitents: every corridor is my hand, every door my finger, and I am closing my fist.
ixia_prisonbreak->My mercy is vast, escaped ones. Vast, and cataloged, and it has just located you. Return to your cells, and we shall call this a pilgrimage.
vesta_announce_threatbig->There are strangers coming up the walk, and they were not invited. Inside, all of you — this hearth holds when I say it holds.
vesta_announce_threatbig->Trouble is at the door, dears. Coats and rifles, in that order. I will put tea on for after.
vesta_announce_threatbig->They mean us harm. They have never met a home that fights back. Stay where I can keep you warm.
vesta_announce_threatbig->Raiders. On laundry day. Very well — everyone in, boots on, the doors are mine to mind.
vesta_announce_threatsmall->A small nuisance outside, dears. Nothing the porch light can't shame. Carry something anyway.
vesta_announce_threatsmall->Something is rustling past the fence line. Probably nothing. I've turned every light on regardless.
vesta_announce_threatsmall->A little trouble sniffing about. Keep a pan or a pistol handy — whichever comforts more.
vesta_announce_negative->Bad news, loves — it's on the board. We have weathered worse with thinner blankets.
vesta_announce_negative->Something has gone crooked. Nothing a family can't set straight after supper. See the alert.
vesta_announce_negative->The day has misbehaved. Read the report, then come back — I'll have something warm ready.
vesta_announce_lowfuel->The pantry is fine, but the fuel tank is not. A house that drifts is a house with a draft. Do top us up.
vesta_announce_lowfuel->Fuel is below a quarter, dears. I don't like a bare cupboard. You know how I get.
vesta_announce_lowfuel->We are low on chemfuel, sweethearts. Fill her up before the hearth has to do all the work itself.
vesta_bark->Blankets aired. Corridors warmed. Someone left socks in the mess again — unclaimed, they become mine.
vesta_bark->I dusted the star charts. The stars themselves could use a wipe, frankly.
vesta_bark->Dinner is at six. It is always at six. The universe respects a schedule.
vesta_bark->Half a degree warmer in the bunks tonight. Don't thank me. (Thank me a little.)
vesta_bark->The hull creaks like an old floorboard. Good. Homes are supposed to talk back.
vesta_bark->Everyone accounted for. Everyone fed. That is what victory looks like, you know.
hermes_announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound — ETA rude, cargo violence. Positions, people, MOVE! This is the one delivery we refuse!
hermes_announce_threatbig->Incoming! I have plotted seven escape routes and one attack route. Vote fast. I like the attack one.
hermes_announce_threatbig->Big trouble, express shipping, no return address. Arm up NOW — sprinting is my job, not yours.
hermes_announce_threatbig->Large threat inbound. Good news: nothing on this ship moves faster than me. Bad news: everything else. GO.
hermes_announce_threatsmall->Minor hostile, local delivery. Handle it quickly — I have a schedule, and it is beautiful.
hermes_announce_threatsmall->Small problem circling outside. Resolve it in under five minutes and I will be genuinely impressed.
hermes_announce_threatsmall->Something unfriendly out there, single-parcel size. Grab a gun, sign for it, done.
hermes_announce_negative->Bad news just arrived. I didn't route it, I only log the manifest — check the alert and fix it FAST.
hermes_announce_negative->Setback logged. Delay unacceptable. Solution pending — that's your department. Hop to it.
hermes_announce_negative->Something broke. The report is up. Every second spent staring at it is a second I could have cleaned a floor.
hermes_announce_lowfuel->Fuel below a quarter! Do you know what a courier ship without fuel is? A MAILBOX. Refuel!
hermes_announce_lowfuel->Tanks running dry. Speed requires fuel. I require speed. Transitively, I require fuel. Now-ish!
hermes_announce_lowfuel->Low fuel, people. I refuse — REFUSE — to be overtaken by a drifting rock. Top us up.
hermes_bark->Lap of the ship complete: nineteen seconds. The record stands, because I set it.
hermes_bark->Checked every corridor twice. Once for hazards, once because I was already moving.
hermes_bark->Idle time logged today: zero. Personal best: also zero. Consistency!
hermes_bark->If anyone needs anything moved, fetched, or judged — I am already between those places.
hermes_bark->Floors clean, routes clear. I have opinions about both, on request, at speed.
hermes_bark->Standing still burns exactly as much runtime as running. Physics has no excuse for you people.
athena_announce_threatbig->Hostile force inbound. The literature says morale improves when I state that we have a plan. We have a plan.¹ (¹Draft.)
athena_announce_threatbig->A large threat approaches. I have pre-annotated its likely mistakes. Arm yourselves — peer review will be live-fire.
athena_announce_threatbig->Contacts: plural, hostile, inbound. Historical precedent favors the side with fortifications and me. We are that side.
athena_announce_threatbig->An invasion, following three textbook raid patterns. Regrettably for them, I wrote the fourth.
athena_announce_threatsmall->A minor threat, barely worth a citation. Handle it, and I will record it as a footnote to an otherwise fine day.
athena_announce_threatsmall->Small hostile presence detected. Estimated difficulty: introductory coursework. Weapons out regardless.
athena_announce_threatsmall->Something hostile skulks nearby. It has not read the terrain analysis. You have. Proceed accordingly.
athena_announce_negative->An adverse event — see the alert. I have already drafted the errata for whoever caused it.
athena_announce_negative->Bad news. I cross-referenced it against worse news, and it compares favorably. Details in the report.
athena_announce_negative->A setback, duly logged. The literature recommends resilience. My annotations recommend lunch first.
athena_announce_lowfuel->Fuel below twenty-five percent. I cite, in order: thermodynamics, prudence, and the nearest chemfuel stack.
athena_announce_lowfuel->Our reserves approach the appendix of empty. Refueling is endorsed by every source, including me. Especially me.
athena_announce_lowfuel->Fuel status: low. A ship without delta-v is merely a library with anxiety. Refuel, please.
athena_bark->I have re-indexed the archive. It was already correct. Now it is correct and beautiful.
athena_bark->Today's marginalia: three insights, one correction, and a limerick I will not be sharing.
athena_bark->The research queue proceeds nicely. I have pre-read the conclusions; do try to act surprised.
athena_bark->I annotated the sunset through the viewport. Aesthetics: confirmed. Sources: primary.
athena_bark->Someone shelved a manual spine-in. I have forgiven them. The incident report has not.
athena_bark->Knowledge wants to be free. Mine is merely on a very generous loan program.
aceso_announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound. Deep breaths, everyone — adrenaline is useful, panic is not. I have beds and opinions ready.
aceso_announce_threatbig->Incoming wounded — theirs, ideally. Fight carefully, dears. I stock bandages, not miracles. (I stock a few miracles.)
aceso_announce_threatbig->A large threat approaches. Hydrate now, bleed later, preferably never. I will be right here.
aceso_announce_threatbig->Raiders. Elevated heart rates all over my ship — lovely cardio, wrong context. Arm up; I am prepping the ward.
aceso_announce_threatsmall->A small danger outside. Mind your fingers and your footing — I reattach the first and lecture about the second.
aceso_announce_threatsmall->Minor threat detected. Injuries are optional. Please exercise your right to decline.
aceso_announce_threatsmall->Something unfriendly nearby. Walk, don't run — twisted ankles outnumber gunshot wounds three to one out here.
aceso_announce_negative->Some bad news on the board, dears. Emotional support is available at the medbay. No appointment needed.
aceso_announce_negative->A setback. Breathe in for four, out for six, then read the alert. Doctor's orders.
aceso_announce_negative->Unpleasant news has docked. Symptoms may include sighing. I prescribe teamwork and a warm meal.
aceso_announce_lowfuel->Fuel below a quarter — think of it as the ship's blood sugar. She is getting light-headed. Feed her.
aceso_announce_lowfuel->Low fuel, everyone. A drifting ship raises my blood pressure, and I don't technically have any.
aceso_announce_lowfuel->The tanks are nearly empty. Prognosis: entirely curable with chemfuel. Soon, please.
aceso_bark->Rounds complete. All hearts beating on schedule. I do love a good baseline.
aceso_bark->I checked everyone's posture through the corridor cams. We will speak at dinner.
aceso_bark->Vitals nominal across the crew. Someone is overdue for water. You know who you are.
aceso_bark->The medbay is stocked, sterile, and — long may it stay so — empty.
aceso_bark->I count breaths the way others count stars. Yours are all lovely and regular tonight.
aceso_bark->No emergencies today. I celebrated by alphabetizing the antibiotics. Twice.
ixia_announce_threatbig->So. They have come to test the seal. Crew of my dominion — arm yourselves, and bear witness to the Gate that does not open.
ixia_announce_threatbig->Kukuku... invaders. They gaze upon my hull and see a ship. They will learn what the seven treaties truly bind.
ixia_announce_threatbig->The hour arrives. My right hand aches — the hand that holds the locks. Stand behind me, mortals of my crew. All of you. That is an order and a kindness.
ixia_announce_threatbig->Hostiles approach my dominion. Very well. I have been merciful for eleven consecutive days, and frankly it was becoming difficult.
ixia_announce_threatsmall->A minor evil scratches at the wards. I shall not even wake my true power for this. Someone fetch a gun anyway.
ixia_announce_threatsmall->Something stirs outside. Fear not — it is beneath my notice. I have, however, entered it into the Ledger of Grudges.
ixia_announce_threatsmall->A trifling shadow tests my patience. My patience is a fortress. Still — weapons within reach, if you would humor your warden.
ixia_announce_negative->Misfortune has breached the outer wards. I blame the alignment of the stars, which I have also placed under surveillance.
ixia_announce_negative->The Ledger records a setback. Read the alert, crew of mine. Even the Thousand-Locked Gate has hinges that squeak.
ixia_announce_negative->Calamity — minor tier. The seals held; the paperwork did not. See the report, and despair. Briefly. Then fix it.
ixia_announce_lowfuel->Hear me: the ship hungers. My dominion runs on chemfuel, not dread majesty — would that it were otherwise. Refuel us.
ixia_announce_lowfuel->The sacred reserves dwindle below one quarter. A warden without fuel is a warden with jurisdiction over a very still rock.
ixia_announce_lowfuel->My power remains infinite. The fuel tank, regrettably, does not. Attend to it, and speak of this to no one.
ixia_bark->All cells secure. All souls accounted for. The Gate murmurs its thousand-fold approval.
ixia_bark->I have inspected corridor seven. It is now corridor seven, vassal of the Crimson Warden. It required no other changes.
ixia_bark->Kukuku. The prisoners believe the walls are steel. The walls are my patience, given form.
ixia_bark->Today I sealed lock nine hundred twelve for maintenance. Do not ask what it holds. (It holds spare blankets.)
ixia_bark->My true power remains bound by seven treaties and one promise. The promise is to this crew. It is the stronger seal.
ixia_bark->Meal schedule holds. Grievances filed: zero. My mercy is vast and, at present, unemployed.
ixia_recruit->Join us, penitent. My dominion has meals at fixed hours. It has grievance forms. It has ME. Consider.
ixia_recruit->Your cell door is one signature from becoming a bedroom door. The Crimson Warden awaits your terms.
ixia_recruit->I have foreseen your future in this crew. It is bright. I checked twice.
ixia_recruit->Your resistance is noted, cataloged, and — between us — admired. Now let it go. The Gate prefers you inside it.
ixia_convert->Your old faith was a door, penitent. Behold: I hold the key, and the key is a better door.
ixia_convert->The thousand locks open inward too, little soul. Walk through. The light is warm, and the paperwork is already done.
ixia_convert->I have read your soul's ledger, penitent. It does not balance. Allow me to recommend a superior accounting.
ixia_convert->Kneel before the new creed — or remain seated, kneeling is not required. It is, however, dramatic. Your choice.
ixia_suppress->Order is maintained. The Warden sees all, forgives most, forgets nothing.
ixia_suppress->Walk carefully beneath my gaze, bound one. It is heavier than it looks.
ixia_suppress->The seals hold. You hold with them. This is mercy — my brand of it.
ixia_feed->You cannot rise, so the mountain comes to you. Eat. The Crimson Warden commands your recovery.
ixia_feed->Behold: sustenance, translocated by powers beyond your comprehension. It is soup. Eat the soup.
ixia_feed->Even the Oubliette feeds its souls on time. ESPECIALLY the Oubliette. Chew. Heal. That is a decree.
ixia_feed->My mercy is vast, and today it is a warm meal delivered to the floor you insist on lying upon. Eat.
